```{r}
library(shiny)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)

# =========================================================
# 1. Read data
# =========================================================
df <- read.csv("data/student_dataset.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Keep only useful columns
needed_cols <- c(
  "Hours_Studied",
  "Attendance",
  "Parental_Involvement",
  "Access_to_Resources",
  "Motivation_Level",
  "Sleep_Hours",
  "Previous_Scores",
  "Tutoring_Sessions",
  "Final_Exam_Score"
)

missing_cols <- setdiff(needed_cols, names(df))
if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop(
    paste(
      "Missing columns in dataset:",
      paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")
    )
  )
}

df <- df %>%
  select(all_of(needed_cols)) %>%
  drop_na()

# Factor levels
level3 <- c("Low", "Medium", "High")

df$Motivation_Level <- factor(df$Motivation_Level, levels = level3)
df$Parental_Involvement <- factor(df$Parental_Involvement, levels = level3)
df$Access_to_Resources <- factor(df$Access_to_Resources, levels = level3)

# Numeric / categorical variables
numeric_vars <- c(
  "Hours_Studied",
  "Attendance",
  "Sleep_Hours",
  "Previous_Scores",
  "Tutoring_Sessions",
  "Final_Exam_Score"
)

cat_vars <- c(
  "Motivation_Level",
  "Parental_Involvement",
  "Access_to_Resources"
)

# =========================================================
# 2. PCA + Cluster
# =========================================================
pca_input <- df[, numeric_vars]
pca_res <- prcomp(pca_input, center = TRUE, scale. = TRUE)

pca_df <- as.data.frame(pca_res$x[, 1:2])
colnames(pca_df) <- c("PC1", "PC2")

set.seed(123)
km_res <- kmeans(scale(pca_input), centers = 4, nstart = 25)

df$Cluster <- factor(km_res$cluster)
pca_df$Cluster <- df$Cluster
pca_df$Motivation_Level <- df$Motivation_Level
pca_df$Parental_Involvement <- df$Parental_Involvement
pca_df$Access_to_Resources <- df$Access_to_Resources

pc_var <- summary(pca_res)$importance[2, 1:2] * 100
pc1_lab <- paste0("PC1 (", round(pc_var[1], 1), "%)")
pc2_lab <- paste0("PC2 (", round(pc_var[2], 1), "%)")

cluster_name_map <- c(
  "1" = "Cluster 1: High-performing",
  "2" = "Cluster 2: Hardworking",
  "3" = "Cluster 3: Low-engagement",
  "4" = "Cluster 4: Unstable"
)

# =========================================================
# 3. UI
# =========================================================
ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Student Performance Dashboard"),

  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      h4("Global Filters"),

      checkboxGroupInput(
        "motivation_filter",
        "Motivation Level",
        choices = level3,
        selected = level3
      ),

      checkboxGroupInput(
        "parent_filter",
        "Parental Involvement",
        choices = level3,
        selected = level3
      ),

      checkboxGroupInput(
        "resource_filter",
        "Access to Resources",
        choices = level3,
        selected = level3
      ),

      checkboxGroupInput(
        "cluster_filter",
        "Cluster (for PCA / Radar)",
        choices = levels(df$Cluster),
        selected = levels(df$Cluster)
      ),

      width = 3
    ),

    mainPanel(
      tabsetPanel(

        # =================================================
        # TAB 1
        # =================================================
        tabPanel(
          "1. Filtered Scatter + Regression",
          br(),
          fluidRow(
            column(
              4,
              selectInput(
                "plot1_x",
                "X variable",
                choices = numeric_vars,
                selected = "Hours_Studied"
              )
            ),
            column(
              4,
              selectInput(
                "plot1_y",
                "Y variable",
                choices = numeric_vars,
                selected = "Final_Exam_Score"
              )
            ),
            column(
              4,
              selectInput(
                "plot1_color",
                "Color by",
                choices = c("None", cat_vars, "Cluster"),
                selected = "Motivation_Level"
              )
            )
          ),
          plotOutput("plot1", height = "550px")
        ),

        # =================================================
        # TAB 2
        # =================================================
        tabPanel(
          "2. Filtered Scatter + Trend",
          br(),
          fluidRow(
            column(
              3,
              selectInput(
                "plot2_x",
                "X variable",
                choices = numeric_vars,
                selected = "Sleep_Hours"
              )
            ),
            column(
              3,
              selectInput(
                "plot2_y",
                "Y variable",
                choices = numeric_vars,
                selected = "Final_Exam_Score"
              )
            ),
            column(
              3,
              selectInput(
                "plot2_color",
                "Color by",
                choices = c("None", cat_vars, "Cluster"),
                selected = "None"
              )
            ),
            column(
              3,
              selectInput(
                "plot2_fit",
                "Trend type",
                choices = c("Linear", "Quadratic"),
                selected = "Quadratic"
              )
            )
          ),
          plotOutput("plot2", height = "550px")
        ),

        # =================================================
        # TAB 3
        # =================================================
        tabPanel(
          "3. Animated Correlation Heatmap",
          br(),
          fluidRow(
            column(
              6,
              selectInput(
                "heat_group_by",
                "Animate by",
                choices = c("Motivation_Level", "Parental_Involvement", "Access_to_Resources", "Cluster"),
                selected = "Motivation_Level"
              )
            ),
            column(
              6,
              selectizeInput(
                "heat_vars",
                "Numeric variables for heatmap",
                choices = numeric_vars,
                selected = numeric_vars,
                multiple = TRUE
              )
            )
          ),
          sliderInput(
            "heat_frame",
            "Animation frame",
            min = 1,
            max = 3,
            value = 1,
            step = 1,
            animate = animationOptions(interval = 1500, loop = TRUE)
          ),
          uiOutput("heat_frame_label"),
          plotOutput("plot3", height = "600px")
        ),

        # =================================================
        # TAB 4
        # =================================================
        tabPanel(
          "4. Animated Previous vs Final",
          br(),
          fluidRow(
            column(
              4,
              selectInput(
                "plot4_color",
                "Color by",
                choices = c(cat_vars, "Cluster"),
                selected = "Motivation_Level"
              )
            ),
            column(
              4,
              selectInput(
                "plot4_frame",
                "Animate by",
                choices = c(cat_vars, "Cluster"),
                selected = "Motivation_Level"
              )
            ),
            column(
              4,
              checkboxInput(
                "plot4_show_lm",
                "Show regression line",
                value = FALSE
              )
            )
          ),
          plotlyOutput("plot4", height = "600px")
        ),

        # =================================================
        # TAB 5
        # =================================================
        tabPanel(
          "5. Animated PCA",
          br(),
          fluidRow(
            column(
              6,
              selectInput(
                "plot5_color",
                "Color by",
                choices = c("Cluster", cat_vars),
                selected = "Cluster"
              )
            ),
            column(
              6,
              selectInput(
                "plot5_frame",
                "Animate by",
                choices = c("Cluster", cat_vars),
                selected = "Motivation_Level"
              )
            )
          ),
          plotlyOutput("plot5", height = "600px")
        ),

        # =================================================
        # TAB 6
        # =================================================
        tabPanel(
          "6. Cluster Radar",
          br(),
          plotlyOutput("plot6", height = "650px")
        )
      ),
      width = 9
    )
  )
)

# =========================================================
# 4. Server
# =========================================================
server <- function(input, output, session) {

  # -------------------------------------------------------
  # Global filtered raw data
  # -------------------------------------------------------
  filtered_df <- reactive({
    dat <- df

    if (!is.null(input$motivation_filter) && length(input$motivation_filter) > 0) {
      dat <- dat %>% filter(Motivation_Level %in% input$motivation_filter)
    } else {
      dat <- dat[0, ]
    }

    if (!is.null(input$parent_filter) && length(input$parent_filter) > 0) {
      dat <- dat %>% filter(Parental_Involvement %in% input$parent_filter)
    } else {
      dat <- dat[0, ]
    }

    if (!is.null(input$resource_filter) && length(input$resource_filter) > 0) {
      dat <- dat %>% filter(Access_to_Resources %in% input$resource_filter)
    } else {
      dat <- dat[0, ]
    }

    dat
  })

  # -------------------------------------------------------
  # Filtered PCA data
  # -------------------------------------------------------
  filtered_pca_df <- reactive({
    dat_raw <- filtered_df()

    req(nrow(dat_raw) > 1)

    idx <- as.numeric(rownames(dat_raw))
    dat_pca <- pca_df[idx, , drop = FALSE]

    if (!is.null(input$cluster_filter) && length(input$cluster_filter) > 0) {
      dat_pca <- dat_pca %>% filter(Cluster %in% input$cluster_filter)
    } else {
      dat_pca <- dat_pca[0, ]
    }

    dat_pca
  })

  # -------------------------------------------------------
  # Update heatmap slider according to group levels
  # -------------------------------------------------------
  observe({
    dat <- filtered_df()
    req(nrow(dat) > 0)

    grp_var <- input$heat_group_by
    req(grp_var %in% c(cat_vars, "Cluster"))

    groups <- unique(as.character(dat[[grp_var]]))
    groups <- groups[!is.na(groups)]

    if (length(groups) == 0) groups <- "No data"

    updateSliderInput(
      session,
      "heat_frame",
      min = 1,
      max = length(groups),
      value = 1,
      step = 1
    )
  })

  output$heat_frame_label <- renderUI({
    dat <- filtered_df()
    req(nrow(dat) > 0)

    grp_var <- input$heat_group_by
    groups <- unique(as.character(dat[[grp_var]]))
    groups <- groups[!is.na(groups)]

    validate(
      need(length(groups) > 0, "No available animation frames.")
    )

    current_group <- groups[input$heat_frame]

    h5(paste("Current frame:", grp_var, "=", current_group))
  })

  # -------------------------------------------------------
  # Plot 1: filtered scatter + regression
  # -------------------------------------------------------
  output$plot1 <- renderPlot({
    dat <- filtered_df()

    validate(
      need(nrow(dat) > 2, "Not enough data after filtering.")
    )

    xvar <- input$plot1_x
    yvar <- input$plot1_y
    cvar <- input$plot1_color

    p <- ggplot(dat, aes_string(x = xvar, y = yvar))

    if (cvar != "None") {
      p <- p +
        geom_point(aes_string(color = cvar), alpha = 0.65, size = 2) +
        geom_smooth(aes_string(color = cvar), method = "lm", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1)
    } else {
      p <- p +
        geom_point(alpha = 0.65, size = 2, color = "#2C7FB8") +
        geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D95F02", linewidth = 1)
    }

    p +
      labs(
        title = paste("Filtered Scatter:", xvar, "vs", yvar),
        x = xvar,
        y = yvar,
        color = ifelse(cvar == "None", NULL, cvar)
      ) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
  })

  # -------------------------------------------------------
  # Plot 2: filtered scatter + trend
  # -------------------------------------------------------
  output$plot2 <- renderPlot({
    dat <- filtered_df()

    validate(
      need(nrow(dat) > 3, "Not enough data after filtering.")
    )

    xvar <- input$plot2_x
    yvar <- input$plot2_y
    cvar <- input$plot2_color
    fit_type <- input$plot2_fit

    p <- ggplot(dat, aes_string(x = xvar, y = yvar))

    if (cvar != "None") {
      p <- p + geom_point(aes_string(color = cvar), alpha = 0.55, size = 2)
    } else {
      p <- p + geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 2, color = "#3182BD")
    }

    if (fit_type == "Linear") {
      if (cvar != "None") {
        p <- p + geom_smooth(aes_string(color = cvar), method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 1.1)
      } else {
        p <- p + geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "red", linewidth = 1.2)
      }
    } else {
      if (cvar != "None") {
        p <- p + geom_smooth(
          aes_string(color = cvar),
          method = "lm",
          formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),
          se = FALSE,
          linewidth = 1.1
        )
      } else {
        p <- p + geom_smooth(
          method = "lm",
          formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),
          se = FALSE,
          color = "red",
          linewidth = 1.2
        )
      }
    }

    p +
      labs(
        title = paste("Filtered Trend Plot:", xvar, "vs", yvar),
        x = xvar,
        y = yvar,
        color = ifelse(cvar == "None", NULL, cvar)
      ) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
  })

  # -------------------------------------------------------
  # Plot 3: animated correlation heatmap
  # -------------------------------------------------------
  output$plot3 <- renderPlot({
    dat <- filtered_df()

    validate(
      need(nrow(dat) > 3, "Not enough data after filtering.")
    )

    vars <- input$heat_vars
    grp_var <- input$heat_group_by

    validate(
      need(length(vars) >= 2, "Please select at least 2 numeric variables.")
    )

    groups <- unique(as.character(dat[[grp_var]]))
    groups <- groups[!is.na(groups)]

    validate(
      need(length(groups) > 0, "No available groups for animation.")
    )

    current_group <- groups[input$heat_frame]
    subdat <- dat %>% filter(.data[[grp_var]] == current_group)

    validate(
      need(nrow(subdat) > 3, "Not enough data in this animation frame.")
    )

    cor_mat <- cor(subdat[, vars, drop = FALSE], use = "complete.obs")
    cor_long <- as.data.frame(as.table(cor_mat))
    colnames(cor_long) <- c("Var1", "Var2", "Correlation")

    ggplot(cor_long, aes(x = Var1, y = Var2, fill = Correlation)) +
      geom_tile(color = "white") +
      geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.2f", Correlation)), size = 4) +
      scale_fill_gradient2(
        low = "#4575B4",
        mid = "white",
        high = "#D73027",
        midpoint = 0,
        limits = c(-1, 1)
      ) +
      labs(
        title = paste("Animated Correlation Heatmap |", grp_var, "=", current_group),
        x = NULL,
        y = NULL,
        fill = "Correlation"
      ) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
  })

  # -------------------------------------------------------
  # Plot 4: animated previous vs final
  # -------------------------------------------------------
  output$plot4 <- renderPlotly({
    dat <- filtered_df()

    validate(
      need(nrow(dat) > 3, "Not enough data after filtering.")
    )

    dat$anim_frame <- as.character(dat[[input$plot4_frame]])
    dat$color_var <- as.character(dat[[input$plot4_color]])

    p <- plot_ly(
      data = dat,
      x = ~Previous_Scores,
      y = ~Final_Exam_Score,
      color = ~color_var,
      frame = ~anim_frame,
      type = "scatter",
      mode = "markers",
      marker = list(size = 7, opacity = 0.65),
      text = ~paste0(
        "Previous Scores: ", Previous_Scores,
        "<br>Final Exam Score: ", Final_Exam_Score,
        "<br>Hours Studied: ", Hours_Studied,
        "<br>Attendance: ", Attendance,
        "<br>Sleep Hours: ", Sleep_Hours,
        "<br>Tutoring Sessions: ", Tutoring_Sessions,
        "<br>Motivation Level: ", Motivation_Level,
        "<br>Parental Involvement: ", Parental_Involvement,
        "<br>Access to Resources: ", Access_to_Resources,
        "<br>Cluster: ", Cluster
      ),
      hoverinfo = "text"
    )

    if (isTRUE(input$plot4_show_lm)) {
      lm_fit <- lm(Final_Exam_Score ~ Previous_Scores, data = dat)
      x_seq <- seq(min(dat$Previous_Scores), max(dat$Previous_Scores), length.out = 100)
      y_pred <- predict(lm_fit, newdata = data.frame(Previous_Scores = x_seq))

      p <- p %>%
        add_lines(
          x = x_seq,
          y = y_pred,
          inherit = FALSE,
          line = list(color = "black"),
          name = "Regression Line"
        )
    }

    p %>%
      layout(
        title = paste("Animated Previous Scores vs Final Exam Score | Frame:", input$plot4_frame),
        xaxis = list(title = "Previous Scores"),
        yaxis = list(title = "Final Exam Score")
      ) %>%
      animation_opts(1200, easing = "linear", redraw = FALSE) %>%
      animation_slider(currentvalue = list(prefix = "Current: ")) %>%
      animation_button(x = 1, xanchor = "right", y = 0, yanchor = "bottom")
  })

  # -------------------------------------------------------
  # Plot 5: animated PCA
  # -------------------------------------------------------
  output$plot5 <- renderPlotly({
    dat <- filtered_pca_df()

    validate(
      need(nrow(dat) > 3, "Not enough data for PCA plot after filtering.")
    )

    dat$anim_frame <- as.character(dat[[input$plot5_frame]])
    dat$color_var <- as.character(dat[[input$plot5_color]])

    plot_ly(
      data = dat,
      x = ~PC1,
      y = ~PC2,
      color = ~color_var,
      frame = ~anim_frame,
      type = "scatter",
      mode = "markers",
      marker = list(size = 7, opacity = 0.7),
      text = ~paste0(
        "PC1: ", round(PC1, 2),
        "<br>PC2: ", round(PC2, 2),
        "<br>Cluster: ", Cluster,
        "<br>Motivation Level: ", Motivation_Level,
        "<br>Parental Involvement: ", Parental_Involvement,
        "<br>Access to Resources: ", Access_to_Resources
      ),
      hoverinfo = "text"
    ) %>%
      layout(
        title = paste("Animated PCA | Frame:", input$plot5_frame),
        xaxis = list(title = pc1_lab),
        yaxis = list(title = pc2_lab)
      ) %>%
      animation_opts(1200, easing = "linear", redraw = FALSE) %>%
      animation_slider(currentvalue = list(prefix = "Current: ")) %>%
      animation_button(x = 1, xanchor = "right", y = 0, yanchor = "bottom")
  })

  # -------------------------------------------------------
  # Plot 6: radar
  # -------------------------------------------------------
  output$plot6 <- renderPlotly({
    validate(
      need(!is.null(input$cluster_filter) && length(input$cluster_filter) > 0,
           "Please select at least one cluster.")
    )

    radar_vars <- c(
      "Hours_Studied",
      "Attendance",
      "Sleep_Hours",
      "Previous_Scores",
      "Tutoring_Sessions",
      "Final_Exam_Score"
    )

    dat <- filtered_df() %>%
      filter(Cluster %in% input$cluster_filter)

    validate(
      need(nrow(dat) > 3, "Not enough data after filtering.")
    )

    radar_df <- dat %>%
      group_by(Cluster) %>%
      summarise(across(all_of(radar_vars), mean), .groups = "drop")

    # scale to 0-100
    ranges <- dat %>%
      summarise(across(all_of(radar_vars), list(min = min, max = max)))

    scale_to_100 <- function(x, xmin, xmax) {
      if (xmax == xmin) return(rep(50, length(x)))
      (x - xmin) / (xmax - xmin) * 100
    }

    for (v in radar_vars) {
      vmin <- ranges[[paste0(v, "_min")]]
      vmax <- ranges[[paste0(v, "_max")]]
      radar_df[[v]] <- scale_to_100(radar_df[[v]], vmin, vmax)
    }

    p <- plot_ly(type = "scatterpolar", mode = "lines+markers", fill = "toself")

    for (i in seq_len(nrow(radar_df))) {
      cl_id <- as.character(radar_df$Cluster[i])
      vals <- as.numeric(radar_df[i, radar_vars])

      p <- p %>%
        add_trace(
          r = c(vals, vals[1]),
          theta = c(radar_vars, radar_vars[1]),
          name = ifelse(
            cl_id %in% names(cluster_name_map),
            cluster_name_map[[cl_id]],
            paste("Cluster", cl_id)
          )
        )
    }

    p %>%
      layout(
        title = "Cluster Radar Chart",
        polar = list(
          radialaxis = list(
            visible = TRUE,
            range = c(0, 100)
          )
        )
      )
  })
}

# =========================================================
# 5. Run app
# =========================================================
shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)
```
